violations.text: Certified FMC09348 has expired as of 7/16/23 license must be renewed. PIC needs to resend CFSM application. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Certified FMC09348 has expired as of 7/16/23 license must be renewed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

White rice and general tao sauce were observed held at (46-49) degrees Fahrenheit in veggie walk-in cooler. Per PIC rice and general tao sauce were cooked 9/24/2025 and placed in veggie walk-in cooler. Establishment shall not use veggie walk-in cooler for TCS foods until veggie walk-in cooler is adjust/fixed and maintaining a temp. 41 degrees below. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Walk-in cooler located in the basement area was not in good repair. Observed walk-in cooler holding temp. at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of the following were observed to have food residue, and other debris... - Kitchen fan - Refrigeration surfaces/prep units (internal/external) - Underneath equipment Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024 New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Kitchen fan shroud(s) - Refrigeration surfaces (internal/external) - Kitchen shelving Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. PIC is to have a proper air gap installed for the sink drain used for food preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions and to aid in the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Raw animal foods (beef and chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (chicken wings) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Foods were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

Previously Prepared foods were observed held at 43 to 47 degrees Fahrenheit in the vegetable and prepared foods walk-in coolers (see temperatures). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit and above were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The following equipment was observed in need of adjustment/repair... - The gasket to the cookline prep unit observed detaching from the cooler door - The vegetable walk-in cooler and the prepared foods walk-in cooler were observed holding an ambient temperature of 46 and 43 degrees Fahrenheit respectively. The walk-in coolers were adjusted to a colder setting at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The non-food-contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Kitchen fan shroud(s) - Refrigeration surfaces (internal/external) - Kitchen shelving Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. PIC is to have a proper air gap installed for the sink drain used for food preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions and to aid in the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023

Open containers of food were observed stored in the lowboy refrigeration units. The shelves above the food were observed peeling and with visible debris. The shelves shall be cleaned and the food shall be protected from potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
The stand up freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine was turned off and will be washed, rinsed, and sanitized by the end of the day. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
